name: Lotus Glass Pipe
summary: The Lotus 14 mm Glass Pipe is a minimalist yet highly functional accessory designed to pair seamlessly with the Lotus Cap.
description: The Lotus 14 mm Glass Pipe is a minimalist yet highly functional accessory designed to pair seamlessly with the Lotus Cap. Made from durable borosilicate glass, it delivers smooth, clean vapour while offering excellent airflow and easy upkeep. Compact and stylish, it’s a go-to option for daily use. Borosilicate glass ensures that every session preserves the natural flavours of your herbs without interference. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Type
specs.value: Glass pipe with 14 mm female joint
